title: Codi — AI Agent Configuration
subtitle: One config file. Every AI agent. Yours.
author: Codi

sections.label: Key Features
sections.heading: Everything your AI needs
sections.body: Codi unifies rules, skills, and agents across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, and Cline — from a single source of truth.
items: Write once, deploy to every AI agent in your stack
Versioned skills and rules that evolve with your team
Install community presets or publish your own

sections.label: Get Started
sections.heading: Up and running in 30 seconds
sections.body: Initialize Codi in any project and start configuring your AI agents immediately.
items: Run `codi init` in your project root
Add rules, skills, and agents from the registry
Run `codi generate` to propagate to all AI tools
sections.callout: Your AI agents. Your standards. No drift.
